form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 40 m by Alwaysbjoy (1:55.60) in 2-3yo+ wins on April 7 at $101. The run before 5th (Fr5) over 1780m at this track, beaten 8 m by Zeezeezoom (2:09.90) in Up to 3 LTW on April 1 at $19. Rates highly and from a much better draw can bounce back.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr3) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 30 m by Laneys Last (2:16.00) in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $14. At the run before game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1660m after showing early pace at Albion Park beaten 6 m by Rosies Boy (2:00.90) in Up to 3 LTW on March 30 at $8. Rates highly and is well-placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third behind Two Ticks at this track over 1780m in a 2-3yo+ wins on March 26 at $34. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Miarka at Albion Park over 1660m in a Up to 3 LTW on March 30 at $11. Going along well. Sure to play a major role.
